title: Add test coverage for orchestrator/router.py model routing
description: router.py maps task types to models, max turns, and timeouts. A misconfiguration here silently sends tasks to the wrong model (e.g., using haiku for synthesis). No tests exist to catch this.
requirements: Test all task types have model routing entries
Test critical tasks (research_agent, synthesis, analyzer) route to correct models
Test timeout values are reasonable (not 0, not absurdly high)
Test max_turns values exist for all routed types
done_criteria: tests/test_router.py exists with at least 4 test functions
context: router.py is small but load-bearing. Wrong model for synthesis = garbage newsletter.
